title: Immigration Lawyers
content:
## We’d love to hear from you
If you would like to proceed with a consultation with a Canadian immigration lawyer at MKS Immigration lawyers please complete our form or call our office at 1-604-632-0188.
The cost for a 60-minute consultation is $550 CAD (plus applicable tax).  In some circumstances, this may be credited towards the fixed fee for an application.
The consultation fee $550 CAD (plus applicable tax) is non-refundable.
The use of the Internet or this form for communication with the firm or any individual member of the firm does not establish a lawyer - client relationship. Confidential or time-sensitive information should not be sent through this form.
